items.zh: Supermicro 联合创始人因走私 $25 亿 Nvidia AI 芯片至中国被捕，SMCI 股价暴跌 33%
items.en: SMCI co-founder arrested for smuggling $2.5B Nvidia AI servers to China; stock crashes 33%

items.zh: Nvidia 与 AWS 签 $21 亿大单，2027 年前供应超 100 万颗 AI 芯片
items.en: Nvidia signs $2.1B deal to sell 1M+ GPUs to AWS by 2027

items.zh: OpenAI 计划年底前员工翻倍至 8,000 人
items.en: OpenAI plans to double headcount to 8,000 by end-2026

items.zh: BTC 报 $69,223，24h 跌 2%，恐惧贪婪指数降至 10（极度恐惧）
items.en: BTC at $69,223 (-2%), Fear & Greed Index hits Extreme Fear at 10

items.zh: MicroStrategy Q1 已狂买 89,618 枚 BTC，创第二大季度购买纪录
items.en: MicroStrategy bought 89,618 BTC in Q1, second-biggest quarter ever

items.zh: 美股上周再跌 1.9%，距 1 月高点已回调 6.8%
items.en: S&P 500 down 1.9% last week, 6.8% off Jan highs

items.zh: Micron (MU) 跌 3.9%，Q3 指引未达预期
items.en: Micron drops 3.9% after Q3 guidance misses

items.zh: 黄金价格波动，开斋节需求 + 地缘紧张交织
items.en: Gold fluctuates on Eid demand and geopolitical tensions
